Each source of damage dealt to you and permanents you control is increased by 1.
cards.flavor_text: "Beauty becomes burden, protection becomes prison."

cards.name: The Publican
cards.rules_text:
When The Publican enters the battlefield, create a Tavern artifact token.
Tavern tokens have "At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player may pay {1} and 1 life. If they do, they draw a card and create a 1/1 white and black Human Patron creature token."
Whenever a player creates a Patron token, each player may pay {1}. Each player who does creates a Treasure token and gains 1 life.
At the beginning of each end step, any player who controls three or more Patron tokens may exile those tokens. When they do, that player gains control of target nonland permanent and creates a Tavern token.
cards.flavor_text: "A round of drinks opens more doors than a battering ram."

cards.name: The Queen Mother
cards.rules_text:
When The Queen Mother enters, create X 1/2 green and black Ant creature tokens with reach and vigilance, where X is 2 plus the result of rolling two four-sided dice.
Ants you control have "Whenever this creature blocks or becomes blocked, put a +1/+1 counter on it."
The Queen Mother has indestructible and hexproof as long as you control an Ant.
Whenever The Queen Mother becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, create a 2/3 green and black Ant creature token with reach and vigilance.
cards.flavor_text: "Their devotion transcends mere instinct — it is written in the very essence of their being."

cards.name: The Rabbit Prince
cards.rules_text:
Double strike, haste
If a creature would deal combat damage to any target, it deals double that damage instead.
Whenever The Rabbit Prince deals combat damage to a player for the first time each turn, you may have target creature you control gain double strike and haste until end of turn. That creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the amount of combat damage The Rabbit Prince dealt to that player this turn. Then untap all creatures you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.
cards.flavor_text: "In the Court of Swift Justice, every strike tells two tales."— The Rabbit Prince

cards.name: The Rakshasa
cards.flavor_text: "Truth is but another form of deception when every shape holds secrets."

cards.name: Curse of Leprosy
cards.rules_text:
Enchant player
When Curse of Leprosy enters and during your upkeep, put a disease counter on it.
At the beginning of your end step, lose 2 life for each disease counter on Curse of Leprosy.
Creatures you control can't gain counters and get -1/-1 for each disease counter on Curse of Leprosy.
Pay {B} life, where X is twice the number of disease counters on Curse of Leprosy: Remove a disease counter.
cards.flavor_text: "The flesh remembers what the mind wishes to forget."

cards.name: The Snakebite
cards.rules_text:
Split second (As long as this spell is on the stack, players can't cast spells or activate abilities that aren't mana abilities.)
Put X -1/-1 counters on target creature, where X is twice that creature's power. Then create X 1/1 green Snake creature tokens with deathtouch and infect.
Exile The Snakebite with three time counters on it and suspend 3. (At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, cast this card without paying its mana cost.)
When you cast The Snakebite from exile, double the number of poison counters each player has.
cards.flavor_text: "First comes fear. Then pain. Finally, the blessed numbness of acceptance."

cards.name: The Survivor
cards.rules_text: If you would lose the game, instead shuffle your hand, your graveyard, and all permanents you own into your library, then draw seven cards and your life total becomes your starting life total. You may cast three spells from your hand without paying their mana costs.
cards.flavor_text: "Death itself holds no dominion over those marked by fate."

cards.name: The Tangled Briar
cards.rules_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
{T}: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is number of lands you control. You may reveal a land card from among them and put it onto the battlefield. If you do, you may cast a creature spell from your hand without paying its mana cost. Then roll a d6 and create that many 3/3 green Plant creature tokens with trample and haste under a random opponents' control. Those creatures must attack you each combat if able.
Landfall — Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
cards.flavor_text: "Every secret has its price. Every truth its consequence."

cards.name: The Teamster
cards.rules_text:
When The Teamster enters the battlefield, choose one —
• Begin a quest. (Create a Quest enchantment token with "At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 2 life" and "When you cast a spell with mana value 5 or greater, sacrifice this enchantment and search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.")
• Accept a burden. (You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 2 life.")
{G}, Sacrifice The Teamster: Create a 4/4 black and white Avatar creature token with flying and lifelink, then create two Treasure tokens. Activate only if you don't control a Quest token or have an emblem from The Teamster.
cards.flavor_text: "Accept your destiny, or be consumed by it."

cards.name: The Theatre
cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, each player creatures a 1/1 green and white Human Performer creature token.
Whenever a creature dies, put a Spotlight counter on The Theater.
{T}, Remove a Spotlight counter from The Theater: Choose one —
• Encore performance — Create two 2/2 white Human Performer tokens with "When this creature enters the battlefield, tap target creature an opponent controls."
• Inspire the audience — Each player draws a card, then you draw two additional cards.
• Standing ovation — Each player gains 1 life, then you gain 1 life for each creature you control.
cards.flavor_text: "Every battle tells a story; every victory earns an ovation."

cards.name: The Trumpet
cards.rules_text:
Abilities you activate cost {X} less to activate, where X is half the number of lands you control, rounded down.
{8}, {T}: Create a creature token with power and toughness each equal to X. Choose one —
• A white Knight with first strike and vigilance.
• A black Demon with menace and deathtouch.
• A blue Elemental with flying and lifelink.
{8}, {T}: Search your library for a creature card with mana value less than or equal to X, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then shuffle. You may cast that card this turn without paying its mana cost.
cards.flavor_text: "The call echoes across the planes, summoning champions of the highest virtue to stand against the tide."

cards.name: The Twin
cards.rules_text:
Flash, Haste
{T}, Choose target creature. The Twin becomes a copy of that creature except it has the opposite characteristics at the time of copying: If the chosen creature is tapped, this is untapped. If it has +1/+1 counters, this gets -1/-1 counters of equal number (and vice versa). If it has "can't block," this must block each turn if able (and vice versa). Power and toughness are swapped. It gains this ability.
cards.flavor_text: "In every reflection lies a truth reversed."

cards.name: The Tyrant
cards.rules_text:
Vigilance, Menace, Indestructible
When The Tyrant enters the battlefield, you become the monarch.
As long as you're the monarch:
• At the beginning of your upkeep, each opponent sacrifices a permanent. For each permanent sacrificed this way, create a Treasure token and put a +1/+1 counter on The Tyrant.
• Whenever you cast a spell, copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
• Other players can't cast spells during your turn, and your opponents can't attack you with fewer than three creatures.
cards.flavor_text: "Every crown casts two shadows: one of glory above, one of graves below."

cards.name: The Unicorn
cards.rules_text:
Hexproof, Indestructible
{T}, Shuffle The Unicorn into the Deck of Many Things: Choose one —
• Rewrite the Past — Return all creatures put into your graveyard this turn to the battlefield.
• Shape the Future — Shuffle up to five cards from your graveyard into your library, then draw two cards.
• Unravel Time — Look at the top three cards of the Deck of Many Things. Exile one of them, shuffle one back into the Deck, and put the last one on top.
• Divine Undoing — Undo one choice you made during the game. Reverse any visible effects caused by that decision.
cards.flavor_text: "In its radiant presence, regret dissolves and time itself bows, offering a second chance to those who dare to dream anew."

cards.name: The Uprising
cards.rules_text:
When The Uprising enters, roll 3d6. Create that many 1/1 white Human Peasant creature tokens with "When this creature dies, choose one — Each opponent draws a card, or creates a 2/2 black Knight creature token with vigilance."
At the beginning of your upkeep, put a shield counter on target Peasant you control.
Sacrifice a Peasant: Create two Treasure tokens and draw a card.
{T}: Peasant tokens you control get +1/+0 and menace until end of turn.
cards.flavor_text: "Their loyalty was pure. Their competence... less so."

cards.name: The Vision
cards.rules_text:
An opponent chosen at random secretly chooses one of these omens:
• Peace — At the beginning of your next turn, draw three cards and gain 5 life.
• War — At the beginning of your next turn, destroy target creature an opponent controls and create three 2/2 black Knight creature tokens.
At the beginning of your next upkeep, choose one —
• Embrace — The chosen omen occurs.
• Reject — The unchosen omen occurs.
cards.flavor_text: "Two futures dance before your eyes. One true, one false... but which is which?"

cards.name: The Wanderer
cards.rules_text:
When The Wanderer enters the battlefield, each player reveals their hand. For each nonland permanent card revealed this way, its controller may put that card onto the battlefield. When they do, that permanent gains all abilities of another permanent of their choice that shares a card type with it.
At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player chooses a non-legendary, non-land, non-token permanent they control. Until end of turn, it becomes an artifact in addition to its other types and gains one of the following abilities at random:
• Manaforge — {T}: Add three mana of any one color.
• Insight — {T}: Draw two cards, then discard a card.
• Replication — {T}, Pay 3 life: Create a token that's a copy of target artifact you control.
• Rebirth — {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Return target permanent card from your graveyard to your hand.
Whenever a permanent gains an ability this way, its controller creates a Treasure token and that permanent becomes legendary.
cards.flavor_text: "In the hands of the chosen, the mundane awakens to extraordinary purpose."

cards.name: The Waxworks
cards.rules_text:
Roll a d6. An opponent chosen at random creates that many 2/2 blue, black, and red Shapeshifter creature tokens with the following abilities:
• This creature can't be blocked by creatures that share a color with it.
• This creature must attack the player who drew The Waxworks each combat if able.
• When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to the player who drew The Waxworks.
cards.flavor_text: "In every reflection lies a darker self, yearning to destroy its origin."

cards.name: The Winged Serpent
cards.rules_text:
Flying, Hexproof, Haste
{1}: Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order.
{T}: Draw a card.
Sovereign Wish — Sacrifice The Winged Serpent: Choose one —
• Search your library for a card and put it into play. If it's a creature, it gains haste.
• Exile all creatures and planeswalkers your opponents control.
• Gain control of all nonland permanents target opponent controls.
• Target player's life total becomes 1 or 40.
• Target player skips their next turn or you take an extra turn after this one.
• Return any number of target permanent cards from your graveyard to play.
• Remove the Deck of Many Things from the game and/or exile all cards from all graveyards, then each player shuffles their hand and all permanents they own into their library, then draws seven cards. You may put any number of permanent cards from your hand onto the battlefield.
cards.flavor_text: Its wings span the frontier of possibility, where a desire becomes the fabric of destiny.

cards.name: Plane of Air
cards.rules_text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 5 life unless you control a creature with flying.
You can't play lands.
Each non-flying creature you control becomes a 1/1 and can't block.
Whenever you cast a spell, roll a d20:
1-5: Counter that spell.
6-10: Counter that spell unless you pay {2}.
11-15: Copy that spell. You may choose new targets for the copy.
16-20: Copy that spell twice. You may choose new targets for the copies.

cards.name: The Beginning
cards.rules_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Each player shuffles their hand, all cards they own in exile, their graveyard, and all permanents they control into their library, then draws seven cards and gains 10 life.
II — Search your library for two land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
III — You get an emblem with "At the beginning of your upkeep, scry 1, then draw a card. You have no maximum hand size."
IV — Take an extra turn after this one. During that turn, you may play an additional land and spells you cast cost {2} less to cast.

cards.name: The Champion
cards.rules_text:
First strike, vigilance
At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a shield counter on The Champion. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)

cards.flavor_text: "With each battle won, another hero rises to follow. Such is the way of legends." —Elspeth Tirel

Flash

At the beginning of your upkeep, roll a six-sided die and apply the above effect.

At the beginning of your upkeep, create a Gold token.

cards.flavor_text: "Some say fortune favors the bold. I say fortune favors those wise enough to recognize its true value." —Teysa Karlov

cards.name: The Crown
cards.rules_text:
The Crown enters the battlefield tapped.
You have no maximum hand size.
At the beginning of your end step, if you control three or more creatures, draw a card and each opponent loses 1 life.
{Q}: Gain control of target creature with power less than or equal to the number of cards in your hand as long as you control The Crown. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn.
{Q}, Sacrifice The Crown: Each creature you control deals damage equal to its power to its owner. Exile those creatures.
cards.flavor_text: "To wear the crown is to hold the strings of fate—and snap them at your whim." —Erasis, the Unbroken Tyrant

Creatures have vigilance and lifelink.

cards.flavor_text: "As light banishes shadow, so too does hope restore the broken."

cards.rules_text:

Creatures have haste, double strike, and trample.
Whenever a creature attacks, it gains +1/+0 until end of turn.
If a creature would die during combat, exile it instead. At the end of combat, return it to the battlefield tapped.
cards.flavor_text: "At the height of the sun's power, blades never dull, and warriors never tire."

cards.name: The Destiny
cards.rules_text: Create an emblem with "If you would lose the game, instead your life total becomes 1. Then, exile this emblem."
cards.flavor_text: "I saw it then—the golden thread of fate, shimmering through the tapestry of existence. For a heartbeat, it wrapped around my soul and pulled me back from the brink. Now I understand why they call it the thread that cannot break." —Serra's Knight, sole survivor of the Fallen Gates

cards.name: The Dusk
cards.rules_text:

cards.name: The Mystery
cards.rules_text:
When The Mystery enters the battlefield, each player exiles the top three cards of their library face down.
